completed_tasks.title: Fix Copper class loading error in nodes-base package
completed_tasks.description: Build is failing with ApplicationError: Class could not be found for className: Copper. The error occurs in packages/core/dist/nodes-loader/directory-loader.js during metadata generation. Need to investigate missing or incorrectly named Copper class in nodes-base package.

completed_tasks.title: Fix EmailReadImap and other class loading errors in build

Need to systematically identify and fix all broken @utils imports causing class loading failures during metadata generation.
